title: Testimonial Details

fields.label: Client Name
fields.name: testimonial_client_name
fields.instructions: Full name of the client — displayed on the card.

fields.label: Designation
fields.name: testimonial_designation
fields.instructions: Client's job title and company — displayed below the name.

fields.label: Client Photo
fields.name: testimonial_avatar
fields.instructions: Client's profile photo — shown as the avatar on the testimonial card.

fields.label: Rating
fields.name: testimonial_rating
fields.instructions: Star rating displayed on the testimonial card.

fields.label: Review Title
fields.name: testimonial_title
fields.instructions: Short bold headline for the card — e.g. "Outstanding work from start to finish."
fields.placeholder: e.g. Outstanding work from start to finish.

fields.label: Review Text
fields.name: testimonial_review
fields.instructions: The full testimonial review — displayed as the main quote on the card.
fields.placeholder: e.g. The team delivered beyond what we imagined. Within two months of launch our inbound lead volume doubled...

description: Client name, designation, photo, rating and review text for each testimonial card.
